failure_reason: Closed the next BML native compiler floor step: lexical const/name binding. Executable BML source now parses const-int plus return-name and return-name-add-int rules; BMA reference lowering and Hati fourth-kernel lowering both resolve bound names through binding snapshots, so later constants do not masquerade as the referenced name. Unresolved names remain explicit BML-HATI-UNSUPPORTED name/unbound. The floor record was updated only after validation; the next semantic gate is method parameters and calls.
